name: Super Salsa Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 1/2 oz. or 16-oz.) red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
1 can (15 1/2 oz. or 16-oz.) pinto beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, coarsely mash the beans.
2. Stir in the salsa, onion, garlic, cumin, chili powder, and pepper.
3. Cook over medium heat until hot, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes.
4. Spoon the dip into a serving bowl.
5. Serve with chips.
